articles.title: Heavy to very heavy rainfall and heatwave warning issued for several states, list released | To read the entire bulletin issued by IMD | Inshorts - Inshorts
articles.full_text:
Heavy to very heavy rainfall and heatwave warning issued for several states, list released
The IMD has issued heavy to very heavy rainfall and heatwave warning for several states/UTs for Thursday. Heavy to very heavy rainfall is likely over Assam, Meghalaya, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Arunachal Pradesh, Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram, Tripura, West Bengal, Sikkim, Tamil Nadu and Puducherry. Heatwave conditions are very likely over Gujarat, Maharashtra, Rajasthan and Madhya Pradesh.
